etymology.description: й«џ(й«џ) (biДЃo, "hair") + иЂі(иЂі) (Д›r, "ear") = hair near ears -> hair, beard
etymology.interpretation: The character й«µ(й«µ) blends й«џ(й«џ) (biДЃo, "hair") for its semantic element, indicating hair, with иЂі(иЂі) (Д›r, "ear") as the phonetic component, suggesting the location where the hair grows, such as near the ears. Together, they form a character indicating hair in general.
